notes: Native RJ12 port for direct iControl and iHub-Pro integration; WiFi and MarsPro app control built-in. 4 adjustable mist levels. Humidity auto-regulation via included temp & humidity sensor. Includes 1 long + 2 short flexible hoses, 2-way nozzle, tool kit. Coverage up to 80 m². Power consumption not confirmed (manufacturer page returned 403; retailer inferences conflicted between 30 W and 50 W). Labeled '2026 New' on Amazon — newer smart model replacing the older 5L. Marshydro.eu sale price €79.99 (list €95.99, checkout €71.99).
